name: Rumi
overview: Rumi, a CIB officer, loses his sight and his job in a near-fatal accident. He starts having nightmares of strange events, one of which shockingly translates to reality in a gruesome murder. Now, the blind detective must decipher his nightmares to unravel the mystery behind the violent crime!

trailers.title: Official Trailer | Rumi | Chanchal Chowdhury | Vicky Zahed | 10th Apr | hoichoi | hoichoi bangladesh
